title: JSON Schema for a configuration driver file for the corvus codegenerator.

rootNamespace.description: The default root namespace for generated types.

formatMode.description: Per-format assertion mode overrides. Keys are format names (e.g. 'date-time'); values are the assertion mode. An override takes precedence over assertFormat and the vocabulary's format-assertion behaviour.

tsRuntimeModule.description: (TypeScript engine) The module specifier generated modules import the shared runtime from. Default './corvus-runtime.js' re-emits the runtime alongside each module (self-contained); a package specifier (e.g. '@endjin/corvus-json-runtime') imports the installed runtime package and skips re-emitting it.

tsModulePerType.description: (TypeScript engine) If true, emit one .ts module per generated type plus a barrel index.ts that re-exports them (enables tree-shaking and IDE navigation). The default (false) emits a single generated.ts containing every type.

outputMapFile.description: The name to use for a map file which includes details of the files that were written.

useSchema.description: Provides the fallback schema to use if vocabulary analysis fails.

outputPath.description: The path to which to write the generated code.

defaultAccessibility.description: The default accessibility for generated top-level types.

disableOptionalNameHeuristics.description: If true, do not use optional name heuristics.

disabledNamingHeuristics.description: A list of naming heuristics to disable.

optionalAsNullable.description: If NullOrUndefined, optional properties are emitted as .NET nullable values. If NullOrUndefinedExceptNonNullDefaulted, optional properties that declare a non-null default are instead emitted as non-nullable values.

additionalFiles.description: Additional files to add to the generation context.

namedTypes.description: A list of schema that are to be named explicitly.

namespaces.description:
A map of schema base URIs to .NET namespaces.
Any schema under the given base URI will be mapped into the target namespace.

useImplicitOperatorString.description:
If true, then the conversion operator to string will be implicit, rather than explicit.
Warning: if this is enabled, it is easy to accidentally allocate strings without being explicit about doing so.

useUnixLineEndings.description: If true, then the generated files will use Unix line endings (\n). Otherwise it will use Windows line endings (\r\n).

supportYaml.description: If true, YAML support is enabled. You may use YAML, JSON or a mixture of such documents.

addExplicitUsings.description: If true, then the generated files will include using statements for the standard implicit usings. You should use this when your project does not use implicit usings.

buildParametersThreshold.description: The maximum estimated number of captured value slots an object type's property-parameter Build(...) overload may hold before it is omitted (and callers fall back to the delegate/context Build form). Defaults to 32 when unset.

propertyNames.description: The base URI of the schemas to map to a .NET namespace.

unevaluatedProperties.description: The .NET namespace to use for the base URI.

reference.description: The fully-qualified reference to the schema to name, include the base URI and the pointer fragment.

dotnetTypeName.description: The .NET name to use for the schema.

dotnetNamespace.description:
The (optional) .NET namespace to use for the schema.
This will generate the type directly in the namespace, rather than as a child of its containing type.

accessibility.description: The accessibility to use for the named generated type.

canonicalUri.description: The canonical uri of the file.

contentPath.description: The path to the file to add to the generation context.

fileSpecification.description: Describes a file and its canonical uri.

typeAccessibility.description: The accessibility to use for generated types.

generationSpecifications.description: The generation specification for the code generator.

schemaFile.description: The path to the schema file to process.

rootPath.description: The path in the document for the root type.

outputRootTypeName.description: The .NET name of the root type to generate.

outputRootNamespace.description: The name of the .NET namespace into which to emit the root type

outputRootAccessibility.description: The accessibility to use for the generated root type when outputRootTypeName is specified.
